style_prefix: Stylized cartoon game asset, chunky proportions, slightly exaggerated features, bold clean outlines, warm color palette with soft lighting, playful and slightly comedic tone, high contrast, cel-shaded look, Pixar-meets-Clash-Royale aesthetic, mobile game quality,

house_modifier: warm cozy suburban home, lived-in feel, slight clutter,
